column17: Chart Designer: Dr. Thomas R. Nicely

column2: The 1983 Houston Oilers season was the 24th season the team was with the league.The Oilers got off to a miserable 1-5 start prompting head Coach Ed Biles to resign. He would be replaced by Chuck Studley but the Oilers would not do any better, winning just two of ten games under Studley, and finishing with a terrible 3-13 record. Following the season the Oilers would make Hugh Campbell its new coach.
